title: JavaScript Basics
description: A simple introduction to variables, functions, and events in JavaScript.

title: Decoding NLP: What on Earth is a Tokenizer-Agnostic Metric?
description: Ever wonder how scientists actually measure the raw, foundational brainpower of a language model behind closed doors? Forget standard tests and exam benchmarks—the ultimate, uncheatable test forces models to play a high-stakes game of data compression. This article pulls back the curtain on Bits per Byte, the internal metric researchers use to track true machine intelligence and language understanding.
